Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs_per_bldg.comstock_building_type, sum(bs_per_bldg.tract_count) AS sample_count, sum(bs_per_bldg.bldg_weight) AS units_count, sum(ts_aggr._inner_rows) / CAST(count(DISTINCT (ts_aggr.bldg_id, ts_aggr.state)) AS DECIMAL) AS rows_per_sample, sum(ts_aggr."bs__out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" * bs_per_bldg.bldg_weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption", sum(ts_aggr."bs__out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" * bs_per_bldg.bldg_weight) AS "natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" FROM (SELECT ts_flat.state AS state, ts_flat.bldg_id AS bldg_id, sum(ts_flat."_v__out.electricity.total.energy_consumption") AS "bs__out.electricity.total.energy_consumption", sum(ts_flat."_v__out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption") AS "bs__out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption", count(*) AS _inner_rows FROM (SELECT comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.state AS state, comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.bldg_id AS bldg_id, comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" AS "_v__out.electricity.total.energy_consumption", comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" AS "_v__out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state WHERE comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.upgrade IN (1) AND comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.state IN ('CO', 'NM') AND (comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.bldg_id, comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.state) IN (SELECT bs.bldg_id, bs.state FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_agg_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs WHERE bs.upgrade IN (1) AND bs.applicability = true GROUP BY bs.bldg_id, bs.state HAVING count(distinct(bs.upgrade)) = 1)) AS ts_flat GROUP BY ts_flat.state, ts_flat.bldg_id) AS ts_aggr JOIN (SELECT bs.bldg_id AS bldg_id, bs.state AS state, bs."in.comstock_building_type" AS comstock_building_type, sum(bs.weight) AS bldg_weight, count(*) AS tract_count FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_agg_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs WHERE bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state IN ('CO', 'NM') GROUP BY bs.bldg_id, bs.state, bs."in.comstock_building_type") AS bs_per_bldg ON bs_per_bldg.bldg_id = ts_aggr.bldg_id AND bs_per_bldg.state = ts_aggr.state GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/12355c0c9f2ca11c247c860b2c3937ddfb5c11e595a9cf690c06653fd5f481cf/26e340b1-01fb-4a84-91d8-61a86c7e7325/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
